dashboard.title: DisputeDesk
dashboard.subtitle: Automatic dispute evidence ops
dashboard.automationBanner: DisputeDesk automatically builds evidence packs and saves evidence back to Shopify when complete. Submission happens in Shopify Admin.

disputes.title: Disputes
disputes.subtitle: {total} total
disputes.noPacks: No evidence packs yet. Generate one to get started.
disputes.noPacksAuto: No evidence packs yet. The automation pipeline will generate one automatically, or click Generate Pack.
disputes.noDisputes: No disputes found. Click Sync Now to fetch from Shopify.
disputes.connectStore: Connect a Shopify store to see disputes.
disputes.compliance: Evidence is saved to Shopify via API. Submission to the card network happens in Shopify Admin, or Shopify auto-submits on the due date.

packs.title: Evidence Packs
packs.subtitle: View and manage evidence packages
packs.building: Building evidence pack... This page refreshes automatically.
packs.uploadPlaceholder: Add supporting files (images, PDFs, up to 10 MB each).
packs.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag files here
packs.renderingBanner: Rendering PDF... This page refreshes automatically.
packs.saveDescription: Saves structured evidence fields to Shopify via API. Submission to the card network happens in Shopify Admin.
packs.saveSuccess: Evidence saved to Shopify. Open Shopify Admin to review and finalize your response.
packs.saveFailed: Save failed. Check the audit log below for details, then retry.
packs.lowScore: This pack's completeness is {score}% (below 60% threshold). Missing evidence may weaken your dispute response.
packs.compliance: Evidence is saved to Shopify via API. Submission to the card network happens in Shopify Admin, or Shopify auto-submits on the due date.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan and usage
billing.unlimitedProMessage: Unlimited packs — no limit on your Pro plan.
billing.trialNote: All paid plans include a 7-day free trial. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle. Your data is always retained.

rules.title: Rules
rules.subtitle: Configure how disputes are routed — auto-pack or review queue. First matching rule wins.
rules.paidOnlyMessage: Custom rules require a paid plan. Upgrade to automate your dispute workflow.
rules.name: Name (optional)
rules.matchReasonsHelp: Leave empty to match all reasons.
rules.footer: Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom. First matching rule wins. Disputes matching no rule go to Review Queue.
rules.noRules: No rules configured. All new disputes will go to the review queue by default.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, automation, and preferences
settings.automationBanner: Evidence is saved to Shopify via API. Submission to the card network happens in Shopify Admin (or auto-submits on due date). DisputeDesk does not submit on your behalf.
settings.autoBuildDesc: Automatically generate packs when new disputes are detected
settings.autoSaveDesc: Automatically push complete evidence to Shopify when gates pass
settings.reviewDesc: Park packs in review queue for approval before saving to Shopify
settings.blockerDesc: Block auto-save if any required evidence items are missing
settings.minScoreHelp: Packs below this score won't be auto-saved (0–100)
settings.newDisputeAlertsDesc: Get notified when new chargebacks appear
settings.packCompletionDesc: Notified when evidence packs finish generating
settings.autoSaveConfirmationsDesc: Notified when evidence is auto-saved to Shopify
settings.deleteWarning: Once deleted, your account and all data cannot be recovered.

connect.title: Connect your Shopify store
connect.subtitle: Sync disputes and orders to start managing evidence
connect.privacyNote: Your store data is encrypted and never shared with third parties.

selectStore.noStoresSubtitle: Connect your Shopify store to start managing disputes.
selectStore.selectStoreSubtitle: Choose which store you want to work with

permissions.title: Permission required
permissions.subtitle: We need additional permissions to connect your store
permissions.errorMessage: The app needs access to read orders and disputes. Please ask your store owner or admin to approve these permissions.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage who has access to this store

policies.title: Policies
policies.subtitle: Manage store policies used in evidence packs
